changeSet.author: iecommerce

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = current_schema() AND table_name = 'auth_tenant' AND column_name = 'provisioning_status') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

changeSet.comment: Add provisioning_status for tenant saga (INITIAL, IDP_CREATED, LOCAL_SYNCED, COMPLETED, FAILED). Existing tenants default to COMPLETED.
